title: Liquid Growth Media for Bacteria
steps: Fill the container with 900 mL MQ water.
Add in order while stirring on a heated stir plate: 10 g Peptone 10 g NaCl 5 g Yeast Extract Stir until solids are dissolved.
Bring total volume up to 1 L.
Attach lid and cover with aluminum. Place a piece of autoclave tape on the container.
Autoclave on liquid cycle for 15 minutes.
If necessary, add antibiotic. Amp: 1 μL/mL
Aliquot media into 5, 200 mL volumes in different jars.
creator: Payam Amiri
